introSection:
Roller Coaster is a wooden side friction roller coaster currently located at Great Yarmouth Pleasure Beach in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, UK.

Prior to opening at Great Yarmouth, the Roller Coaster operated at the Exposition Coloniale Internationale in Paris. It was transported to Britain by steamship.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Snails & Fairytales runs through the coaster's supports, with dark ride scenes in between.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Unpainted track and supports. The ride's supports are covered up with blue panels.

fullText:
Roller Coaster is a wooden side friction roller coaster currently located at Great Yarmouth Pleasure Beach in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, UK.

Prior to opening at Great Yarmouth, the Roller Coaster operated at the Exposition Coloniale Internationale in Paris. It was transported to Britain by steamship.

Snails & Fairytales runs through the coaster's supports, with dark ride scenes in between.

Unpainted track and supports. The ride's supports are covered up with blue panels.
